sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Date2  >  '[yyyy-mm-dd]' or Flex3 <> 'ZE')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Date2,Crcy,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,PC,CC) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Date2,Crcy,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,PC,CC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL,Amt1,PC,CC) (Select KeyID, Co,'2520020' as GL,-Amt1,'' as PC,'' as CC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set PC = c.DefaultPC from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = ''

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL,Amt1,PC,CC,Txt,Flex6) (Select KeyID, Co,GL,round(sum(Amt1),2),PC,CC,'Corp Accrual' as Txt,'' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID,Co,GL,PC,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Txt is NULL)
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC <> ''
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
